title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Netafim India Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India Global Group:
Netafim India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India Global Group!
